title: مرسوم بقانون رقم (19) لسنة 1995 في شأن تقويم المؤهلات العلمية
title_en: Decree No. (13) of 1995 Approving the Accession to the International Convention on Civil Liability for Oil Pollution Damage of 1969 and its Protocols for the Years 1976 and 1992, and the International Convention on the Establishment of the International Funds to Compensate for the Oil Pollution Damage of 1971 and its Protocols for the Years 1976 and 1992
